results.rendered_html:
vi-cchid (√chid) P. -chinatti, -chintte to cut or tear or cleave or break asunder, cut off, divide, separate,  AV.  &c. &c.;
to interrupt (see vi-cchidya);
to disturb, destroy,  Bhaṭṭ. ;
to be divided,  TS.

results.rendered_html:
vicchid 7 U.
1 To cut off, break, tear asunder, divide; yadardhe vicchinnaṃ bhavati kṛtasaṃdhānamiva tat  Ś. 1. 9 ;  R. 16. 20 ;  Bh. 1. 96. 
2 To interrupt, break off, terminate, end, destroy, make extinct (as a family); vicchidyamāne'pi kule parasya  Bk. 3. 52 ;  Amaru. 74.
